title: Show HN: What's my JND? – a colour guessing game
full_text:
What's My ΔEOK JND?
 
 

 You see two colours. Click on the line between them. That's it. It
 starts easy. It does not stay easy.
 
 

 Each round the colours get closer together until we find your Just
 Noticeable Difference - the smallest colour change you can actually
 see. It takes about 40 rounds. Most people land around 0.02. You
 might do better. You probably won't. But hey, prove me wrong.
 
 

<screen cleaner referral link goes here>
 Let's go
 What is this? Read the post.
